purpose: the head function's UNGROUNDED-argument arm: a variable that appears only inside the head function's argument list rides as ITSELF (interpretation.py:2300-2305 'If variable not grounded, treat it as itself'), so first_clause_first_grounding(Z) returns the literal 'Z' — a name that is no graph node — and reason() raises the pinned raise shape at the rule-application seam: builtins.KeyError with an EMPTY message (the pinned typed-dict getitem, interpretation.py:583, erases the key from the message).
